contradictions.summary: AE implied NetSuite support, but Product says it is not approved.

claimA.text: NetSuite should be supportable for the pilot, but I will confirm exact scope with Product.

claimB.text: NetSuite is not approved for the pilot.

contradictions.recommendedResolution: Confirm NetSuite scope with Product before mentioning it as pilot scope.

contradictions.summary: Follow-up promises a dashboard preview plan while internal handoff shows no owner.

claimA.text: We will share a renewal dashboard preview plan by May 27

claimB.text: I do not see an owner assigned for the dashboard yet.

contradictions.recommendedResolution: Assign a dashboard owner or renegotiate the May 27 date.
